title: Option C Phase 5: Sandbox Lab Agent Safety
description: Implement L0-L5 promotion ladder (dry-run, read-only, simulated, sandboxed, draft PR, trusted). Agent behavior validator and promotion scorer. Integration with CMP gates.
close_reason: Completed Phase 5: Sandbox Lab with L0-L5 promotion ladder for agent safety. SandboxValidator enforces level constraints (dry-run → read-only → simulated → sandboxed → draft PR → trusted). PromotionScorer evaluates readiness based on execution count, success rate, confidence, violations. SandboxLab orchestrates lifecycle with auto-promotion/demotion. All 6 integration tests pass. Agent trust profiles fully tracked.

title: Option C Phase 4: Console REST API
description: Build REST API endpoints for mission CRUD, status polling, WebSocket magnet event streams, beads queue visibility. Integration tests for all endpoints.
close_reason: Completed Phase 4: Console REST API with full mission/gates/beads endpoints. MissionStore provides in-memory persistence. ConsoleServer implements all CRUD handlers (missions, beads, gates, health). Intake gates run on mission creation. All 6 integration tests pass. Ready for Phase 5 WebSocket/auth/database.

title: Option C Phase 3: CMP Governance Bridge & Beads Integration
description: Build CMP Executor (Intent + Scope + Confidence gates). Implement BeadsBridge to convert roach-pi results into action/learning beads. Wire escalation logic and human overrides.
close_reason: Completed Phase 3: CMP Governance Bridge (Intent, Scope, Confidence gates) + BeadsBridge for bead conversion. Intake gates (Intent/Scope) validate before execution. Confidence gate (post-execution) uses magnet synthesis to quality-gate results. BeadsBridge converts tasks/anomalies/learnings into structured Chromatic Beads (action/alert/learning/score). Full governance flow tested and working.

title: Option C Phase 2: Magnets Integration with roach-pi
description: Wire Execution, Confidence, and Cost Magnets into roach-pi lifecycle. Implement magnet hooks for tool calls, errors, test results. Create magnet-synthesis.ts to aggregate reports.
close_reason: Completed Phase 2: Magnets integration (Execution, Cost, Confidence magnets) with roach-pi adapter. MagnetSynthesis aggregates reports into unified confidence scores and recommendations. All 3 magnets collect telemetry from execution, tests, budget usage. Integrated into adapter with proper type safety. Ready for Phase 3 CMP gates.

title: Option C Phase 1: RuntimeAdapter Interface & Mission Schema
description: Define RuntimeAdapter interface that all runtimes (roach-pi, LangGraph, OpenHands) must implement. Create MissionPacket JSON schema. Build foundational protocol for executor wrapping.
acceptance_criteria: RuntimeAdapter interface complete, MissionPacket schema validated, initial roach-pi adapter stubbed
close_reason: Completed Phase 1: RuntimeAdapter interface, MissionPacket schema, roach-pi adapter stub, runtime registry, and integration tests. Full interface definitions stable. Ready to proceed with Phase 2 Magnets integration.

title: Option C Phase 6: Frontend Console Dashboard
description: React SPA with MissionBoard (create/status/dispatch), MagnetDashboard (real-time events), SandboxPromotions (agent trust tracking). Call Console API endpoints.

title: Implement Chromatic API Router + OpenHuman Sidecar
description: Implement PDR-API-ROUTING-OPENHUMAN in Harness V2. Phase 1: router contracts, confidence/privacy/budget gates, policy-driven provider selection, mock adapter, OpenHuman read-only sidecar adapter, JSONL observability, FastAPI /route endpoint, orchestrator integration, tests.

title: enforce AGENT_RUN_LOG append in agent run hooks
description:
Every Sonnet or Kimi run must append a record to 07_LOGS_AND_AUDIT/AGENT_RUN_LOG.jsonl per PDR-GOV-SONNET-KIMI-001.

ObservabilityLogger._log_agent_run() now handles routing-layer records automatically when selected_model contains 'sonnet' or 'kimi'.

Remaining work:
- Wire extra fields (role, files_touched, next_task, validation) in callers that know them — pass via extra= kwarg to logger.log()
- Add test coverage for _log_agent_run: verify AGENT_RUN_LOG.jsonl is written when model=sonnet/kimi and NOT written for other models
- Pre-existing test failures in test_router_gates.py (test_router_selects_provider_from_policy, test_budget_gate_blocks_excessive_cost) caused by unstaged native_claude_adapter registration — update assertions to accept native_claude or gate the adapter behind a feature flag

title: Phase 3: Wire OpenHuman sidecar to actual HTTP endpoints
description:
Current OpenHuman adapter is a skeleton that calls /health and /api/v1/query. Need to:
- Confirm OpenHuman sidecar base URL and API shape
- Implement proper memory_search and context_query response parsing
- Add integration test with mock OpenHuman server
- Validate read-only enforcement holds under real traffic

Depends on OpenHuman beta being available locally at OPENHUMAN_BASE_URL.

title: Phase 2: Add real provider adapters (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, OpenRouter, Featherless)
description:
Implement actual provider adapters beyond mock and OpenHuman sidecar. Each adapter must:
- Support health check endpoint
- Implement text completion contract
- Handle provider-specific auth (env keys)
- Support fallback chaining
- Log failures to JSONL observability

Adapters needed:
- ollama_adapter.py (local)
- lmstudio_adapter.py (local)
- openai_adapter.py (frontier)
- anthropic_adapter.py (frontier)
- google_adapter.py (frontier)
- openrouter_adapter.py (broker)
- featherless_adapter.py (broker)

Stop if SDK installation changes project scope.

title: HANDOFF: Session 2026-05-28 — Router Phase 1 complete, Phase 2/3 queued
description:
## Session Summary
- PDR-API-ROUTING-OPENHUMAN Phase 1 implemented and pushed to session/chromatic-harness-v2-initial
- 26 tests passing (API + router gates + OpenHuman boundary)
- Docker smoke test passed (/health and /route endpoints verified)
- Retro captured in .agents/retro/2026-05-28-router-openhuman.md

## What's Done
- [x] Router contracts, policy loader, gates (confidence/privacy/budget)
- [x] Mock adapter + OpenHuman read-only sidecar adapter
- [x] JSONL observability with redaction
- [x] FastAPI /route endpoint
- [x] Orchestrator route_to_provider integration
- [x] Config YAMLs (providers, routing-table, privacy-policy, budget-policy)

## What's Queued
- chromatic-harness-v2-rd6: Phase 2 — real provider adapters
- chromatic-harness-v2-1mz: Phase 3 — OpenHuman sidecar HTTP wiring

## Next Session Priority
1. Pick up Phase 2 or Phase 3 based on runtime needs
2. Or pivot to broader P1 governance bugs (mc-xjmq, mc-u93w, mc-v1pw) if those are higher priority

## Branch
session/chromatic-harness-v2-initial → origin (pushed, up to date)

## Known State
- Docker containers stopped after smoke test
- .env.example has placeholder API keys (no secrets committed)
- Router logs directory ignored by .gitignore
- Beads all closed except rd6 and 1mz (Phase 2/3 queued)
